calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Sussane R. Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wing, #11288.

Anna Liu, Esq. for the Plaintiff Danny Ci You Tan and Kun Hong Tan

No appearance by Defendant Anderson Tiu.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1623 32nd Avenue (lower in-law unit), San Francisco, City and County of San Francisco, CA 94122.

Holdover damages $1878.17
Costs $495.00 for a Total of $2,373.17
Judgment signed.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ksenia Tsenin; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Danny Xi Tan is present.
Attorney Steven Adair MacDonald appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anderson Tiu IS NOT is present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-19-2012 remains on calendar.
